title: Commemoration of Commander Martyr Reza Awada ransomware incident

victim.name: Commemoration of Commander Martyr Reza Awada

extortion.description: On this significant anniversary of the martyrdom of Commander Reza Awada, we bow our heads in respect to a man who was not only a leader on the battlefield, but also a beacon of thought and vision. Today, we commemorate someone who, above all, showed us the way, a path leading from darkness to light,…
